actions_taken.details: Patch 1: 'nearly three-quarters' -> '70%' — eliminates 5-percentage-point overstatement that undercuts our credibility on numerical precision. Patch 2: Removed strategic timing motive attribution ('hours before this critical review was launched') — ad hominem weakened otherwise strong factual argument; replaced with pure factual statement about constants lacking discriminating power. Patch 3: Reframed Hubble 'no galactic-scale mechanism' -> precise statement that dome's aetheric mechanism imports H0=70 from standard cosmology and produces numerically identical results. All 3 patches applied cleanly, 2969 tests pass.

actions_taken.action: PREDICTIONS.JSON FIXES (4 entries, curmudgeon backfill review)
actions_taken.details: PRED-R002: restates_win null->035 (it IS a threshold-shifted restatement of WIN-035, inflating apparent novelty). PRED-078: added correction note — tidal force at perigee is ~25% not ~17% (verified: (384400/356500)^3=1.254). PRED-TOROID-001: added falsification risk note — >40 nT/yr exceeds historical 28-35 nT/yr range by 14-43%, making this the most falsifiable geomagnetic prediction in the catalog. PRED-NEW-001-NMP: added southward trend discrepancy note — dome predicts 85.756N (equatorward) while NMP has been drifting poleward.

W004/WIN-025 mapping: section cites -10 ± 2 nT prediction for W004 entry, which matches WIN-025 eclipse test. Raw-text W004='Noise Floor Limit (-22.24 nT)' is wins-page sidebar numbering, a different namespace. Curmudgeon hypothesis (a) confirmed: results.json W-numbers ≠ wins-page W-numbers. live results.json fetch returned 404 (URL changed). Mapping appears correct based on internal evidence. Blocker removed, severity downgraded to minor.
